presentation.latex: ˜xs+1:S ∼p(x s+1:S|x1:s,g).(4) This produces a full trajectory ˜x= (x 1:s, ˜xs+1:S), which is then evaluated using the reward function r(˜x). While this fast denoising process may introduce larger approximation errors, it is highly computationally efficient, making it well- suited for the simulation step in MCTD.
